headline: Jim Cramer Predicts Lennar Share Price Performance (LEN)
summary: We have recently published Jim Cramer Discussed AI Circular Deals, Top Quantum Plays & These 22 Stocks. Lennar Corporation (NYSE:LEN) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer. Lennar Corporation (NYSE:LEN) is one of the largest homebuilders in America. Its shares are down by 12.6% over the past year and 9.8% year-to-date. Jim Cramer […]

headline: Lennar: Foundations Remain Solid, But Market Risks, Valuation Flag Caution
summary: Lennar Corporation faces persistent macroeconomic volatility, with housing market weakness driving a revenue decline in Q1. Learn why LEN stock is downgraded to hold.
